title: Define a raw register-user DTO
scenario: An HTTP adapter receives partial, untrusted data. Start by representing that boundary data separately from the domain command.
instructions: Define RegisterUserDto with public email: Option<String> and display_name: Option<String> fields.

files.content: // TODO: define the raw adapter DTO for registering a user.

hints.body: Keep the Converting DTOs into domain commands code active and define RegisterUserDto with public email: Option<String> and display_name: Option<String> fields.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Define a raw register-user DTO is shown below.

completionExplanation: Define a raw register-user DTO now extends the active Converting DTOs into domain commands code with dto struct raw. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
